findings.description: Loss of visual emphasis, font size, and alignment in the main advisory text.
findings.evidence: The PDF features very large, center-aligned text with specific bolded phrases (e.g., 'liver disease...'). The HTML renders this as significantly smaller, left-aligned text and fails to preserve the bold emphasis.

findings.description: Loss of bold formatting and font size for the legal penalty text.
findings.evidence: The PDF displays the paragraph starting with 'Failure to post...' in a large, bold font. The HTML renders this text (which reflowed onto the first page) in a standard, small, unbolded font.
